purpose: Backfill Phase 1-4 findings after Phase 6 description fills, replacing scaffolded numeric feat metadata with better passive/resource/attack-option/rider metadata where the refreshed descriptions made intent clear.

changedFeats.name: Burst Fire
changedFeats.reason: Exposed as a deliberate combat option or passive roll-context option, not a static actor-sheet modifier.

changedFeats.name: Vehicular Combat
changedFeats.reason: Once per round reaction while piloting: make Pilot check to negate a vehicle/starship hit; also grants proficiency with pilot-operated vehicle weapons.

changedFeats.name: Cleave
changedFeats.reason: After reducing a target to 0 HP, grant one immediate extra melee attack once per round.

changedFeats.name: Throw
changedFeats.reason: Successful Trip through grapple can throw the target and deal unarmed damage.

changedFeats.name: Acrobatic Strike
changedFeats.reason: Applies only after a successful Tumble to avoid an attack of opportunity and only against that foe before the end of the current turn.

changedFeats.name: Extra Second Wind
changedFeats.reason: Adds one extra Second Wind use per day/recovery cycle; encounter cap remains unchanged.

changedFeats.name: Force Boon
changedFeats.reason: Always grants +3 maximum Force Points each level.

changedFeats.name: Whirlwind Attack
changedFeats.reason: Full-round melee action against each opponent within reach; no standing attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Strong in the Force
changedFeats.reason: Changes Force Point dice to d8 when Force Points are spent.

changedFeats.name: Crush
changedFeats.reason: Successful Pin can immediately deal unarmed or claw damage; this is not an attack bonus.

changedFeats.name: Great Cleave
changedFeats.reason: Uses Cleave but removes the once-per-round limit.

changedFeats.name: Improved Damage Threshold
changedFeats.reason: Always-on +5 Damage Threshold.

changedFeats.name: Trip
changedFeats.reason: Successful grapple may knock the opponent prone; this is not an attack modifier.

changedFeats.name: Charging Fire
changedFeats.reason: Exposed as a deliberate combat option or passive roll-context option, not a static actor-sheet modifier.

changedFeats.name: Far Shot
changedFeats.reason: Passive for eligible rolls only. Missing range/action context fails closed and never changes static sheet totals.

changedFeats.name: Pin
changedFeats.reason: Successful grapple may pin the opponent; this is not an attack modifier.

changedFeats.name: Improved Disarm
changedFeats.reason: Exposed as a deliberate combat option or passive roll-context option, not a static actor-sheet modifier.

changedFeats.name: Mighty Swing
changedFeats.reason: Exposed as a deliberate combat option or passive roll-context option, not a static actor-sheet modifier.

changedFeats.name: Powerful Charge
changedFeats.reason: Exposed as a deliberate combat option or passive roll-context option, not a static actor-sheet modifier.

changedFeats.name: Bantha Rush
changedFeats.reason: After a successful melee hit, optionally push an eligible opponent 1 square; no attack bonus is granted.

highValueFixes.name: Far Shot
highValueFixes.fix: Removed fake +2 ranged attack scaffold and replaced it with a one-range-band-closer roll-context rule.

highValueFixes.name: Charging Fire
highValueFixes.fix: Removed inherited charge-style +2 attack scaffold; modeled as ranged charge option with normal Reflex penalty and suppressed charge attack bonus.

highValueFixes.name: Improved Disarm
highValueFixes.fix: Changed broad melee +5 into a disarm-only attack option.

highValueFixes.name: Cleave / Bantha Rush / Pin / Trip / Whirlwind Attack
highValueFixes.fix: Removed false numeric attack modifiers and represented them as action/rider metadata.

highValueFixes.name: Improved Damage Threshold
highValueFixes.fix: Changed from choice-required to true always-on +5 Damage Threshold.

highValueFixes.name: Force Boon / Strong in the Force / Extra Second Wind
highValueFixes.fix: Reclassified existing resourceRules from manual placeholders to passive resource metadata.

deferred.reason: Description confirms +1 HP per character level, but HP is owned by ActorEngine/recomputeHP. Needs a dedicated HP-scaling hook, not a simple static hp.max +N modifier.
Phase 7 passes extra weapon dice through CombatOptionResolver and rollDamage for common weapon-die formulas, but complex weapon formulas still need runtime testing.
Rider rules are now explicit metadata, but post-hit/grapple/vehicle reaction UI surfaces may still need dedicated buttons/prompts.

validation: packs/feats.db parsed as valid JSONL with 419 rows
